hebrew: שצ״ה — מהללאל, דור חמישי, נולד בשנת שצ״ה, שבעים לחיי קינן.
english: AM 395 — Mahalalel, the fifth generation, was born in the year 395, in the seventieth year of Kenan's life.
notes: Same year-node as sederhadoros.com/view/almanac/395 for comparison. Tzemach David is briefer here than Seder HaDoros. Independent English machine translation.
